list.name: symbol
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM equity_market.data_quality_issues ORDER BY symbol

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfHour(detected_at) AS time, issue_type, count() AS cnt FROM equity_market.data_quality_issues WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at) AND symbol IN ($symbol) GROUP BY time, issue_type ORDER BY time
SELECT issue_type, count() AS cnt FROM equity_market.data_quality_issues WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at) AND symbol IN ($symbol) GROUP BY issue_type ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT symbol, issue_type, count() AS cnt FROM equity_market.data_quality_issues WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at) GROUP BY symbol, issue_type ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT severity, count() AS cnt FROM equity_market.data_quality_issues WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at) GROUP BY severity

panels.title: Data Quality Rate (%)
panels.description: Percentage of clean rows across trades + quotes

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100 - (SELECT count() FROM equity_market.data_quality_issues) / ((SELECT count() FROM equity_market.trades) + (SELECT count() FROM equity_market.quotes)) * 100, 3) AS quality_pct

SELECT detected_at, source_table, symbol, event_time, issue_type, severity, details FROM equity_market.data_quality_issues WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at) AND symbol IN ($symbol) ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 200
